cryptographic_standards.rng: crypto.randomInt(charset_size) — unbiased, replaces modulo bias pattern
cryptographic_standards.hashing: SHA-256 via crypto.createHash / Web Crypto API (frontend)

access_control.type_gates: requireHuman() for human-only routes, requirePermission(perm) for Lobster key RBAC
access_control.permission_model: Lobster Key permissions object (canRead, canWrite, canEdit, canDelete)
access_control.default_policy: Deny all without valid Bearer token matching a non-expired api_tokens row
